feedback.text: Hello! I'd like to leave this feedback for the sake of consumer rights concerning video games. As you might already know, big corporations have very unregulated EULA's where if they simply deemed a video game unviable to keep running, they can simply take it down completely and destroy it even after a full price payment which can range from 1 to upwards of 120+'s. This also means i lose complete access to the video game i have paid money to. Which is against consumer rights where i live currently which is finland.
